section_miscategorizations.text: The patient has diabetes type two and a history of asthma.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Past medical history is typically documented in the history (HPI/past history) rather than in the Assessment unless being specifically analyzed or updated; here it is restated without additional diagnostic synthesis.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient is taking flovent twice a day.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is a statement of current medication regimen rather than a new or adjusted treatment plan; it belongs in history/medication history unless it reflects a change, which is not indicated.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient is taking albuterol as needed.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This describes existing PRN medication use, which is part of current medication history rather than a new plan item.
